snippet: Vector database benchmarks 2025: Qdrant leads on filtered search, pgvector wins on operational simplicity, Pinecone wins on managed scale. Market is mature enough to benchmark meaningfully.
author: hannah@mastodon.social

snippet: The serverless vector database trend is real. Pinecone Serverless, Weaviate Cloud, Turso — teams want vector search without managing infrastructure.
author: ian@mastodon.social
